title: product_companion_rules
description: Auto-add rules: 'when we add X, also add Y'. Triggered by the presence of a line in trigger_category (optionally filtered by trigger_match_json). Emits another line in add_category with SKU from add_sku_pattern and quantity from qty_formula. Example: every side_frame triggers one cfc_cover of the same colour; every slat triggers one spacer per 50 slats.

trigger_category.description: Fires when a line in this component_category is present. Examples: 'slat', 'side_frame', 'csr', 'gate', 'gate_side_frame'.

trigger_match_json.description: Additional filter on the triggering context. Empty {} = fire on any row in trigger_category. Example: {"slat_gap_mm":5}.

add_category.description: Category of the companion line being added. Examples: 'cfc_cover', 'spacer_pack', 'sf_cap', 'hinge_set', 'latch_set'.

add_sku_pattern.description: SKU of the companion line. Supports {colour}/{finish}/{frame_cap_size} placeholders and the special placeholders {selected_hinge_sku} / {selected_latch_sku} which resolve via user-chosen hardware variables.

qty_formula.description: math.js expression evaluated in the run/segment context. Examples: 'gate_qty', 'gate_qty * 2', 'ceil(slat_qty/50)', 'same_as(side_frame_qty)'.

is_pack.description: True if the companion SKU is sold as a pack (e.g. 50-pack of screws). Affects rounding behaviour in qty_formula.
